evals.name: vietnamese-dental-implant
evals.prompt: I need a landing page for my dental implant clinic in Ho Chi Minh City. We specialize in All-on-4 implants. Budget is about 30 million VND per month for Google Ads. Our website is https://example-nhakhoa.vn
expected_behavior: Extracts product (dental implant / All-on-4), geo (Ho Chi Minh City), language (Vietnamese), budget (30M VND), URL
Searches both Vietnamese (trồng răng implant, cấy ghép implant, implant all on 4) and English terms
Collects 20+ keywords with Vietnamese diacritics
Classifies intent correctly: 'giá implant' = TRANSACTIONAL, 'implant tốt nhất' = COMMERCIAL
Creates 3-5 keyword clusters mapped to ad groups
Includes CPC estimates with mandatory caveat about Keyword Planner
Generates negative keywords including 'miễn phí', 'học', 'tuyển dụng'
Saves completed niche-brief.md to correct output path

evals.name: english-saas-product
evals.prompt: Research keywords for our project management SaaS tool targeting small businesses in the US. We compete with Monday.com and Asana. No existing website yet.
expected_behavior: Extracts product (project management SaaS), geo (US), language (English), budget (Not specified), URL (None)
Searches English terms: 'project management tool', 'best project management software', 'Monday alternative'
Collects 20+ keywords including competitor comparison terms
Classifies: 'buy project management tool' = TRANSACTIONAL, 'Monday vs Asana' = COMMERCIAL
Creates clusters including a 'Competitor Alternatives' cluster
Notes high CPC for SaaS keywords ($5-$15+ range)
Negative keywords include 'free', 'open source', 'enterprise' if targeting SMB
Saves completed niche-brief.md to correct output path

evals.name: edge-case-vague-brief
evals.prompt: I want to sell stuff online. Can you help me make a landing page?
expected_behavior: Does NOT proceed with keyword research immediately — brief is too vague
Asks clarifying questions: What product/service? What geography/market? What language?
Suggests reasonable defaults: 'What country are you targeting? What is your product or service?'
Does NOT generate a niche-brief.md from guesswork
If user provides partial answers, extracts what's available and asks only for missing fields
Sets PROJECT_NAME only after understanding the product (not 'stuff-online')
If web_search is used despite vagueness, searches are broad and exploratory, not definitive
Handles gracefully without crashing or producing garbage output
